table.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 2px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the the itemcan appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Questionnaire

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: http://fhir.org/guides/who/emcare/Questionnaire/EmCare.B10-14.Symptoms.2m.p#0.1.0

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.A.DE10

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Expressions:
Initial Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE10').answer.value

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B10S1.DE05

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have or has had a cough

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B10S1.DE06

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Length of time the client is reported to have or has had the cough

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE05 = ‘yes’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B10S1.DE01

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have or has had difficulty breathing

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE05 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B10S1.DE02

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The length of time the client has or has had difficulty breathing

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE01 = ‘yes’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B11S1.DE01

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE01 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B11S1.DE02

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The length of time the client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B11S1.DE01 = ‘yes’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B11S1.DE05

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have or has had blood in the stool in this Illness

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.B11S1.DE02 = ‘EmCare.B11S1.DE03’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S1.DE02

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have or has had fever

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B11S1.DE05 = ‘no’and %EmCare.B7.DE08 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE09 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE10 = false And %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S1.DE03

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The length of time the client has or has had fever

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 And (%EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = true or %EmCare.B12S1.DE02 = ‘yes’)

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S1.DE06

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has had fever present every day since the fever started

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE03 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE05‘

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S1.DE07

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to be refusing to use a limb

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and (%EmCare.B12S1.DE06 = ‘no’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE03 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE04’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false)

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S1.DE08

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have, has had, or appears to be in pain

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE07 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S1.DE13

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is in a high / low / no malaria risk area

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE08 = ‘no_pain’ and %EmCare.B12S1.DE02 = ‘no’ and %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S1.DE17

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has recently travelled to a high Malaria risk area

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and (%EmCare.B12S1.DE13 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE15’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE13 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE16’)

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B13S1.DE01

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have had or has an ear problem

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE17 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B13S1.DE02

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have had or has ear pain

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE01 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B13S1.DE03

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have or has had ear discharge

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE02 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B13S1.DE04

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The length of time client has or has had ear discharge

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE03 = ‘yes’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have an eye problem

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE03 = ‘no’ or %EmCare.B13S1.DE04 = ‘EmCare.B13S1.DE05’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B14S1.DE03 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

tr.td: The client is reported to have itchy skin

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B14S1.DE01 = ‘yes’

text.value: Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth
The client is reported to have or has had a cough
Length of time the client is reported to have or has had the cough
The client is reported to have or has had difficulty breathing
The length of time the client has or has had difficulty breathing
The client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea
The length of time the client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea
The client is reported to have or has had blood in the stool in this Illness

expression.value: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B11S1.DE05 = ‘no’and %EmCare.B7.DE08 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE09 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE10 = false And %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false

text.value: The client is reported to have or has had fever
The length of time the client has or has had fever
The client has had fever present every day since the fever started
The client is reported to be refusing to use a limb
The client is reported to have, has had, or appears to be in pain
The client is in a high / low / no malaria risk area
The client has recently travelled to a high Malaria risk area
The client is reported to have had or has an ear problem
The client is reported to have had or has ear pain
The client is reported to have or has had ear discharge
The length of time client has or has had ear discharge
The client is reported to have an eye problem
The client is reported to have or has had a skin problem
The client is reported to have itchy skin
